---
title: "Direct antimicrobial resistance prediction from clinical MALDI-TOF mass spectra using machine learning"
author: 
- Weis
- Cuénod
- Rieck
- et al.
publication: "Nat Med, **28**, 164–174 (2022)"
categories: 
  - external-publication
  - artificial-intelligence
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41591-021-01619-9
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nat Med"
issue: 28
page: 164–174
year: 2022
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/s41591-021-01619-9
---
